detail.description: Max Kepler grounds out, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson.
Max Kepler grounds out, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Gabriel Moreno to 3rd.
Max Kepler singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman José Fermín. Gabriel Moreno to 2nd.
Max Kepler flies out to left fielder Jake Bauers.
Max Kepler pops out to first baseman Jake Bauers in foul territory.
Max Kepler flies out sharply to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.
Max Kepler flies out to left fielder Jackson Chourio.
Max Kepler flies out to left fielder Heliot Ramos.
Max Kepler grounds out to first baseman Rafael Devers.
Max Kepler singles on a fly ball to center fielder Drew Gilbert. Gabriel Moreno to 2nd.
Max Kepler doubles (1) on a line drive to center fielder Drew Gilbert.
Max Kepler grounds out, shortstop Casey Schmitt to first baseman Rafael Devers.
Max Kepler lines out to right fielder Heliot Ramos.
Max Kepler lines out to third baseman Matt Chapman.
Max Kepler doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Corbin Carroll scores.
Max Kepler grounds out, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Gavin Sheets.
Max Kepler pops out to second baseman Jake Cronenworth.
Max Kepler pops out to shortstop Sung-Mun Song.
Max Kepler homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Gabriel Moreno scores. Lourdes Gurriel Jr. scores.

Max Kepler singles on a line drive to left fielder Samad Taylor. Geraldo Perdomo scores. Gabriel Moreno to 3rd. Max Kepler to 2nd. Max Kepler advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by left fielder Samad Taylor.
Max Kepler flies out to right fielder Kyle Tucker.
Max Kepler out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Geraldo Perdomo scores. Corbin Carroll to 3rd.
Max Kepler out on a sacrifice fly to center fielder Andy Pages. Geraldo Perdomo scores.
Max Kepler singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Gabriel Moreno to 3rd.
Max Kepler lines out to right fielder Victor Mesa Jr.
Max Kepler flies out sharply to center fielder Cedric Mullins.
Max Kepler lines out to third baseman Junior Caminero.
Max Kepler flies out to center fielder Cedric Mullins.
